title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Now Gemini
summary: Apple rebuilt Siri at WWDC 2026 with personal context, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, and cross-device integration. The new Siri is reportedly powered by Google Gemini, faces EU regulatory delays, and received a mixed market response with Apple shares falling after the keynote.
writeup: The video covers Apple's WWDC 2026 overhaul of Siri, which adds personal context, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, and cross-device integration, with the reworked assistant reportedly running on Google Gemini. It matters because a flagship Apple feature leaning on a competitor's model signals a shift in how Apple sources its AI. Key takeaways: the new Siri faces EU regulatory delays, and the market response was mixed, with Apple shares falling after the keynote.
